productDisplayName: Skechers Men Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: With a sporty look and stylish design, this shoe from skechers doubles up as a perfect trainer and fashionable casual sport wear. Upper Mesh upper with strategically placed synthetic leather overlays for enhanced breathability Padded tongue and collar for a snug Fit Lacing system for a snug, customised fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort Haul loop for easy on/off and to hang shoes from a backpack Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with brand logo-styled lugs for absolute grip and traction Outsole embeded onto the upper as a toe guard for enhanced durability Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
